title: Hot Blooded
why_this_song: Hot Blooded by Foreigner (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.
teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: I got a fever of a hundred and three
Come on, baby, do you do more than dance?
I'm hot blooded, I'm hot blooded
We can make a secret rendezvous?
I'll show you loving like you never knew

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "blooded" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "blooded" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "you're" in the whole song?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:

excerpts.text: I'm hot blooded, I'm hot blooded

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: "Hot Blooded" was released in 1978. Do you think the themes in the song are timeless, or do they feel dated? Give one example from the lyrics.
exercises.prompt_pt: "Hot Blooded" foi lançada em 1978. Você acha que os temas da música são atemporais ou já parecem datados? Dê um exemplo do que ouviu.

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "Hot Blooded" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "Hot Blooded" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
